text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first of the Classic Triple Crown battles, the
Satsuki Sho, is upon us. The hype for this race is
on a different level from any other so far.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some fans consider Eishin Flash a cut below her
competitors... but her approach remains
unchanged.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's business as usual for her as she makes for the
track with her gaze fixed straight ahead.
